nodes.label: themaasaproject.com
nodes.description: MAASA — Make African Americans Slaves Again. A single-original digital artwork and cinematic essay by Mr. CAP.

nodes.label: No. 01 — Amara: The Heart Within
nodes.quote: She built her whole life on being needed and now nobody needs her, and she don't know what that makes her.

nodes.label: No. 02 — Nia: The Mirror of Truth
nodes.quote: She has been calling boredom love. She has been calling provision intimacy. She has been calling silence peace.

nodes.label: No. 03 — Lila: Finding Her Voice
nodes.quote: Baby, your voice ain't lost. You just been loaning it out for free.

nodes.label: No. 04 — Zuri: Embracing Authenticity
nodes.quote: Authenticity, it turns out, is not a thing you achieve. It's a door you walk through.

nodes.label: No. 05 — Amina: Breaking the Chains
nodes.quote: Chains are heavy. Even when you carry them yourself. Especially then.

nodes.label: No. 06 — Kesha: Warrior of the Streets
nodes.quote: The war ends because, one day, you decide you ain't gotta fight yourself anymore.

nodes.label: No. 07 — Maya: Strength in the Struggle
nodes.quote: Strength is not the absence of struggle. Strength is the continuation of struggle.

nodes.label: No. 08 — Tasha: Rise from the Ashes
nodes.quote: The phoenix is not the same bird. The phoenix is a new bird made out of the heat of what burned.

nodes.label: No. 09 — Aisha: Eyes of Hope
nodes.quote: It was not hope for me. It was hope through me.

nodes.label: No. 10 — Risa: Whispers of Self-Love
nodes.quote: The big version is a billboard. The real version is a whisper.

nodes.label: No. 11 — Lexa: Blueprints of the Heart
nodes.quote: Buildings are never finished. There is always something to maintain, something to upgrade.

nodes.label: No. 12 — Siah: Vision of Love
nodes.quote: I am holding it for the same reason a lighthouse holds its light.

nodes.label: Introduction · Enter the ISM
nodes.quote: "If you don't define your mindset, the world will define it for you."

nodes.description: Self Love Project 2026 — 16 NFT masterpieces bridging cultures and empowering artists.

nodes.label: Prada
nodes.description: A mesmerizing blend of elegance and raw power, Prada captures the essence of modern femininity through bold strokes and ethereal colors.

nodes.label: Sakita
nodes.description: Sakita embodies the spirit of ancient wisdom merged with digital innovation, representing the bridge between tradition and modernity.

nodes.label: Skyla
nodes.description: Soaring through infinite possibilities, Skyla represents freedom and the boundless nature of creative expression.

nodes.label: Trytida
nodes.description: A symphony of geometric patterns and organic flows, Trytida explores the harmony between structure and chaos.

nodes.label: Tya
nodes.description: Bold and unapologetic, Tya challenges conventional beauty standards through vibrant colors and dynamic composition.

nodes.label: Velata
nodes.description: Shrouded in mystery and elegance, Velata invites viewers to explore the depths of hidden emotions and secret desires.

nodes.label: Wydaya
nodes.description: Wydaya celebrates the power of transformation, depicting the moment when potential becomes reality.

nodes.label: Yanna
nodes.description: A digital meditation on connection and solitude, Yanna explores the modern human experience in the digital age.

nodes.label: Minnie
nodes.description: Playful yet profound, Minnie captures the essence of joy and wonder in everyday moments.

nodes.label: Nonah
nodes.description: Complex networks of connection and innovation, Nonah represents the intricate web of modern digital life.

nodes.label: Lola
nodes.description: Lola embodies the rhythm of code and creativity, where programming meets artistic expression.

nodes.label: Deshi
nodes.description: A portrait of focus and determination, Deshi captures the modern creative process in action.

nodes.label: Finti
nodes.description: Digital rain falls in patterns of infinite possibility, Finti explores the matrix of creativity.

nodes.label: Jaspin
nodes.description: Colorful code transforms into visual poetry, Jaspin bridges the gap between logic and art.

nodes.label: Kelia
nodes.description: Community and connection flow through digital channels, Kelia celebrates collaborative creativity.

nodes.label: Kolia
nodes.description: The workspace as canvas, Kolia finds beauty in the tools and environment of modern creation.

nodes.label: Ch. 01 — The Image
nodes.quote: You are not looking at a picture. You are looking at a wound.

nodes.label: Ch. 02 — The Meaning
nodes.quote: Five letters. A sentence the country buried and keeps digging back up.

nodes.label: Ch. 03 — Artist Statement
nodes.quote: I made MAASA because the country kept using the word "progress" like a sedative. — Mr. CAP

nodes.label: Ch. 04 — The Old Chains / The New Chains
nodes.norm_label: the old chains / the new chains
nodes.quote: Same architecture. New language. The master changed clothes.

nodes.label: Ch. 05 — Political Theater
nodes.quote: Both sides perform different versions of the same control.

nodes.label: Ch. 06 — Voting Rights / Control Systems
nodes.quote: Six files from an archive that was never meant to be opened.

nodes.label: Ch. 07 — Artwork Breakdown
nodes.quote: Six symbols. One indictment.

nodes.label: Ch. 08 — Provenance & Rights
nodes.quote: MAASA — Edition 1 of 1. Single original digital artwork, 2025.

nodes.label: Ch. 09 — Manifesto
nodes.quote: The story with no happy ending. The wound does not end.

nodes.label: Ch. 10 — Call to Witness
nodes.quote: You have descended. Now look. The artwork was meant to be witnessed.

nodes.label: File 001 — SHELBY V. HOLDER · 2013
nodes.description: 1965 → reversed in slow motion. Voting Rights Act lost its teeth one ruling at a time.

nodes.label: File 002 — REDISTRICTING DATA HUB
nodes.description: Lines drawn around the body — gerrymandering by map.

nodes.label: File 003 — BRENNAN CENTER · 2024
nodes.description: Papers, please. Strict ID laws — poll tax descendants.

nodes.label: File 004 — PALAST INVESTIGATIVE FUND
nodes.description: Removed for being — voter rolls scrubbed in batches.

nodes.label: File 005 — THE SENTENCING PROJECT
nodes.description: 13th amendment's loophole, monetized — plantation became the prison.

nodes.label: File 006 — PEN AMERICA · 2024
nodes.description: What is not allowed to be said is not allowed to be voted on.

nodes.label: The Rope
nodes.description: It hangs because the country never cut it down.

nodes.label: The Bowed Figure
nodes.description: He is not defeated. He is carrying.

nodes.label: The Red Field
nodes.description: The background is not a color. It is a wound.

nodes.label: The Tree / The Branch
nodes.description: The branches were removed. The shadow was not.

nodes.label: The Wordmark — M·A·A·S·A
nodes.description: Five letters. A sentence the country buried.

nodes.label: The Subtitle
nodes.description: It does not whisper. It states.

nodes.label: pimpintuitionism.com
nodes.description: PIMPINTUITIONISM™ — The Sixth Sense of Street Wisdom. CAP-ism #1 coined by Mr. CAP on April 2, 2015.
nodes.tagline: The natural ability to detect bullshit instantly.

nodes.label: PIMPICON Logo
nodes.description: Official PIMPINTUITIONISM™ favicon/logo.

nodes.label: PIMPINTUITIONISM (Definition)
nodes.description: The natural, highly trained ability to detect bullshit, deception, hoe-activity, or hoe-adjacent behavior instantly — without proof, evidence, or explanation.
nodes.example: "Mr. CAP used pimpintuitionism when a hoe came up short with his money — he already knew she had the rest stashed under her wig."

nodes.label: PIMPINTUITION (Definition)
nodes.description: The raw, natural, built-in sixth sense that instantly alerts you when somebody is lying, scheming, shorting, or running game.
nodes.example: "As soon as dude said he forgot to send the money, CAP's pimpintuition kicked in and he took a screenshot before the excuses even finished."

nodes.label: Crypto Pimpin Brain
nodes.description: Glowing brain representing intuition and the sixth sense.

nodes.label: Origin — April 2, 2015
nodes.description: On April 2, 2015 Mr. CAP publicly posted PIMPINTUITIONISM on Facebook with pronunciation, definition, and example — the earliest known use of the term.

nodes.label: Origin Visual — Houston 2015
nodes.description: Vintage Houston, Texas urban street scene from 2015.

nodes.label: 2015 Facebook Post
nodes.description: Original Facebook post by Cornelius Pratt defining PIMPINTUITIONISM on April 2, 2015. Archived as receipt of origin.

nodes.label: Screwed Up Click
nodes.description: The Screwed Up Click (S.U.C.) — the Houston rap collective founded by DJ Screw in the early 1990s. Home of the chopped & screwed sound, the Screw Tapes, and the freestyle roll call that defined Southside Houston hip-hop.
nodes.tagline: Founded by DJ Screw · Southside Houston

nodes.label: Screw Tapes
nodes.description: The chaptered mixtape series (Chapter 1 through Chapter 400+) hand-mixed by DJ Screw. The origin document of the chopped & screwed sound and the SUC freestyle canon.

nodes.label: Screwed Up Records & Tapes
nodes.description: Screwed Up Records & Tapes — 7717 Cullen Blvd, Houston. The official shop keeping DJ Screw's catalog and the SUC legacy in print.

nodes.label: Chopped & Screwed
nodes.description: The slowed-tempo, chopped, doubled-back DJ technique invented by DJ Screw in Houston — now a global sound signature.

nodes.label: DJ Screw Archive · Houston
nodes.description: The DJ Screw archive and cultural preservation of the SUC catalog held in Houston institutions.
